---
title: "Contributors"
---

Meet the researchers behind The Consortium Blog.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
### Alex Rivera
**Field:** Computational Social Science
**Email:** a.rivera@university.edu
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### Jane Smith
**Field:** Biostatistics
**Email:** j.smith@university.edu
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### Marcus Chen
**Field:** Cognitive Neuroscience
**Email:** m.chen@university.edu
:::

:::
